data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B2DEE:
The power contained in the
METEORITE...\pBy amplifying its power with this
machine, MT. CHIMNEY's volcanic activity\lwill stop.\pFufufu... Eventually, the cooled-down
crater will fill with rainwater, giving\lWATER POKéMON a place to live.
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B2ED9:
ARCHIE: You again...\pNow listen.
All life depends on the sea.\pThe sea is everything!
Its importance is paramount!\pThat is why we of TEAM AQUA are
committed to expanding the sea.\pDoing so will result in the emergence
of new POKéMON species.\pWe will return the world back to
nature for the good of POKéMON.\pThat is TEAM AQUA's vision!\pI can't allow an ignorant child like
you to get in our way.\pI, ARCHIE, will show you the
consequences of meddling!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3099: What?!\pI, ARCHIE, was caught off guard?!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B30C2: ARCHIE: Ah, whatever.\nI will give up our plans for MT.\lCHIMNEY for the time being...\pBut no one can ever stop us!\nTEAM AQUA will prevail!\pDon't you ever forget that!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3168: Hehehe!\pSo you've come all the way here!\pBut you're too late!\nI've already delivered the METEORITE\lfrom METEOR FALLS to the BOSS!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B31EA: Hehehe...\nSo I lost...\pI'm sure glad I never took you on back\nat METEOR FALLS.
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3239: Hehehe!\pYou might have beaten me, but you don't\nstand a chance against the BOSS!\pIf you get lost now, you won't have to\nface a sound whipping!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B32C8: We of TEAM AQUA are working hard for\neveryone's sake.\pLike, if there's more water around,\nWATER POKéMON will be happy, and it'll\lgive people more fun places to swim!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B336E: Hunh?\nWhat do you mean I lost?
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B338D: Our BOSS says, “It will make everyone\nhappy.”\pBut why does everyone keep getting\nin our way?
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B33EA: That annoying TEAM MAGMA...\nThey always mess with our plans!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3446: Go! Stomp TEAM MAGMA!\nAnd expand the sea!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3470: Stay out of our way, okay?\pWe're trying to enlarge the sea for\nthe good of everybody!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B34DC: We're going to keep expanding the sea!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B350B: MAXIE: Oh, {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pPlease, you must stop TEAM AQUA\nfor me!\pThey're trying to make this volcano\ninactive by using the stolen\lMETEORITE's power!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3598: MAXIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}!\pPlease, you've got to stop TEAM AQUA\nfor me!\pDealing with these three thugs is\na lot, even for me!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3608:
MAXIE: {PLAYER}{KUN}! Thank you!\pWith your help, we thwarted TEAM
AQUA's destructive plan!\pBut... This victory doesn't mean the
end of their evil plans.\pWe will remain vigilant and keep up
our pursuit of TEAM AQUA.\p{PLAYER}{KUN}, we shall meet again!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B36F1: Darn... TEAM AQUA outnumbers us!\nWe can't keep up with them!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B372E: If they expand the sea, there'll be less\nhabitats for POKéMON and people!
data_text_aqua_chimney.inc.MtChimney_Text_1B3778: TEAM AQUA wants to expand the sea...\nHow's that for insane?
